title: Melted Jamaican Tofu Frittata
description: A fresh, molten frittata packed with spicy kimchi and Jamaican spices, featuring tofu and a touch of coconut shortening for a creamy texture.
instructions: Heat a 9-inch skillet over medium heat and add the coconut shortening until melted.
Add the crumbled tofu to the skillet and sauté until lightly browned.
Stir in the diced bell pepper and cook for 3 minutes.
Add the chopped kimchi, green onions, allspice, thyme, and cayenne pepper, and cook for another minute.
In a bowl, whisk the eggs, soy sauce, lime juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the tofu and vegetables, tilting the pan to spread it evenly.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 6 minutes until the eggs are set.
Remove the lid, sprinkle fresh cilantro on top, and let it rest for 2 minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
Optionally drizzle a little soy sauce or lime before serving.
